mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bd_widget_board (page_key, user_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{pageKey}, #{userId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT item_no, board_no, item_title, chart_type, grid_x, grid_y, grid_w, grid_h, x_axis_field, y_axis_fields, data_api, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM bd_widget_item WHERE board_no = #{boardNo} ORDER BY sort_order, item_no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bd_widget_item (board_no, item_title, chart_type, grid_x, grid_y, grid_w, grid_h, x_axis_field, y_axis_fields, data_api, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{boardNo}, #{itemTitle}, #{chartType}, #{gridX}, #{gridY}, #{gridW}, #{gridH}, #{xAxisField}, #{yAxisFields}, #{dataApi}, #{sortOrder}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE bd_widget_item SET item_title = #{itemTitle}, chart_type = #{chartType}, grid_x = #{gridX}, grid_y = #{gridY}, grid_w = #{gridW}, grid_h = #{gridH}, x_axis_field = #{xAxisField}, y_axis_fields = #{yAxisFields}, data_api = #{dataApi}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE item_no = #{itemNo}
